They move through custodians, structure, and settlement.

RWA adoption is not about rip…

First, agents become better portfolio assistants.

Second, agents become autonomous allocators of capital.

That means capital moving across DeFi, RWAs and online markets without sitting inside a traditional brokerage interface.

That is a new https://t.co/F8b473chxM

Robinhood is not just bringing users to DeFi.

It is making DeFi disappear into the product experience.

Stablecoins, vaults, collateral and yield become one tap inside a mainstream app.

That is the future IXS is building for: regulated vault infrastructure behind the next

Happy 4th of July to our US partners, friends, and community.

The United States has always been a driving force behind financial innovation, capital markets, and entrepreneurial ambition.

As real-world assets, stablecoins, and regulated onchain finance continue to grow, we’re https://t.co/XZi1LnLcs8

RWA changes the source.

When real-world assets move onchain, yield starts connecting to real cash flows, real collateral, and real economic activity  not just token incentives.

That is not a small upgrade.

It is the https://t.co/zwRA54ZD0R

Congrats to Securitize on $SECZ.

Proud to share @SPiCE_VC as a common backer.

Capital markets are not just moving onchain. They are being rebuilt around regulated rails. 🏗️
https://t.co/esjw7hARTm

$12.5T.
$10.1T.
$5.9T.

The world’s largest asset managers are not fringe players.

They are the financial system.

So when they move onchain, the question is not whether tokenization is real.

The question is what happens to everything else when the rails beneath global finance https://t.co/I5JnHKzYTX

Autonomous agents are becoming economic actors.

The question is no longer whether they can transact.

It’s where they settle, manage risk and put capital to work. https://t.co/bPqNPZ5e27

Checked the route.

USDC to yield.
Via regulated RWA vaults.
On schedule. https://t.co/D1b2OKTE7n
Looking forward to this in a few hours!
https://t.co/LovjT8hLRP
https://t.co/MQJmGztRJt

It is TradFi at the entry point, DeFi in the middle, and TradFi again a…

Permissionless trading proved the demand.

Now watch what happens when the same assets plug into onchain yield, lending, and autonomous capital allocation.

Chainlink is showing what the institutional stack looks like:

Banks, tokenized assets, payments, settlement and compliance all connected onchain.

The next step is simple: make those assets usable, yield-bearing and accessible through regulated RWA vaults.

No forms.
No phone calls.
No dashboard.

Just a prompt.

Closer than most think. https://t.co/gG7f9UFAH7

tweets.text:
RT @swissarmysteven: Prime crossed $10M in active loans this week.

In this market, slow and steady is the kind of growth we want.

Prime active loans just crossed $10M 🙌🏻

Permissioned, KYC and AML compliant access to a global network for wholesale borrowing and lending.

$CPOOL https://t.co/O5mY6kv3el

Onchain lending coming to the XRP Ledger.
Bringing institutional credit rails to networks where real capital already lives 👀

$CPOOL
Japan just approved RLUSD for launch via SBI. The compliant money layer keeps expanding across Asia, and that settlement base is what institutional onchain credit is built on.

US regulators are moving to require stablecoin issuers to run customer identification programs. Six agencies, including the Fed, OCC and FDIC, advanced KYC rules under the GENIUS Act this month, with final regulations due by July 18.

Know-your-customer is becoming the baseline

Bernstein report this week: tokenized RWAs at $51B, up 40% YTD, despite the broader crypto market falling.

Private credit is the largest category at 47% of the total.

Institutional interest in tokenization is accelerating independent of crypto market conditions.

Step by step,

Prime active loans just crossed $5,000,000 🙌🏻 

The institutional demand for permissioned onchain credit is here.

$CPOOL https://t.co/0lD1F7vbvA

Clearpool is live on @XDCNetwork. Now XDC-native institutions can tap into Clearpool's credit markets directly⚡️

More to come.

$CPOOL https://t.co/wjPkhfbTqI

Citi just published their Tokenization 2030 report.

Key takeaways:
- $17B today, $5.5T by 2030 (base case). Bull case $8T - Five asset classes drive the call: public equities, US treasuries, private credit, private equity and real estate funds.
- Stablecoins hitting $1.9T is https://t.co/Nfx84xc24H

Prime is back and we're just getting started. Just crossed $2,000,000 in active loans ⚡️

Permissioned, KYC & AML compliant access to the largest global network for wholesale borrowing and lending.

$CPOOL https://t.co/ntoucp3eKp

Clearpool Prime is back 🙌🏻
The product built for how institutions actually borrow.

$CPOOL https://t.co/JYGY7rpDqO

Clearpool has joined @XDCNetwork as an institutional Masternode Validator 💥

XDC has already processed over $1B in tokenized trade finance and real-world assets, and we're bringing credit infrastructure with $930M+ in originated loans to that ecosystem.

Clearpool will run https://t.co/nb7GRorHx5

The stacks are converging.
One step closer to 24/7 markets.

X-Pool is growing and just crossed $2.5M in deposits💥 

Earn a 6-15% APR on USDC, USDT, USDX and RLUSD.  

Built w/ @Hex_Trust markets.

$CPOOL https://t.co/dpCJ9x2VxT
@Hex_Trust https://t.co/B7trSOU6D0

50+ institutions are joining DTCC’s tokenization pilot this July, targeting U.S. Treasuries, ETFs, and equities for an October launch.

The plumbing of U.S. capital markets is being rebuilt on-chain. A massive validation for the RWA sector and the future of institutional DeFi. https://t.co/KFtCjPlk5F
https://t.co/NPqpJRDU07

💡X-Pool: How does the strategy work? 

The X-Pool is a dual-engine stablecoin return strategy by @Hex_Trust Markets and Clearpool, deployed on Ethereum.

Deposit USDC, USDT, USDX, or RLUSD and your capital is put to work across two engines: a stability-oriented return floor, https://t.co/HulYXkWGlB
https://t.co/sx0voTUWdJ
https://t.co/et4GV2h3JP

Regulated markets cannot operate with every position, counterparty, and audit trail exposed.

They need programmable privacy where sensitive data remains private, with selective disclosure when required.

Dusk enables private smart contracts for regulated markets.

A tokenized securities trade has two sides: securities delivery and payment settlement.

When delivery and payment rely on separate systems, the handoff carries risk. The security can move before the payment settles, and both sides may still need reconciliation after the fact. https://t.co/ePQQWDxnxL

EU AMLR bans anonymous crypto-asset accounts.

Pure anonymity does not fit regulated finance. Markets need privacy and review.

Dusk was built around that distinction with Phoenix and Hedger for privacy, Moonlight for transparency, and selective disclosure for regulated review.

Dusk will be at Dutch Blockchain Week in Amsterdam on June 24-25.
